basic_details.job_title: HNBGU Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Field Assistant/ Investigator Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Hemvati Nandan Bahuguna Garhwal University (HNBGU) has officially announced the Field Assistant/ Investigator Recruitment 2026 with 6 openings. The detailed notification has been published on the official website, hnbgu.ac.in. Candidates holding a Post Graduate degree in any Social Science or Humanities discipline can submit their applications through email on or before 25-07-2026. Eligible shortlisted candidates will attend the walk-in interview on 27-07-2026. Direct links to download the official notification and application details are shared below.

qualification.education_qualification: Post-graduate degree in any Social Science or Humanities discipline.
qualification.details: Field Assistant/Investigator: Post-graduate degree (MA/ MSc/ MLIS/ M.Ed. etc.) in any Social Science or Humanities discipline (e.g., Anthropology, Sociology, Social Work, History, Political Science, Economics, etc.). Demonstrated fieldwork experience (village surveys, ethnographic work, socio-economic surveys or similar). Ability to work in hill terrain and stay in field areas during survey. Working knowledge of Hindi; knowledge of local Pahari/Jaunsari dialects will be an added advantage.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for HNBGU Field Assistant/Investigator Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download HNBGU Field Assistant/Investigator Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for HNBGU Field Assistant/Investigator Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Field Assistant/Investigator post at HNBGU?
faq.answer: The last date to send your application email for the Field Assistant/Investigator post at Hemvati Nandan Bahuguna Garhwal University is 25-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Field Assistant/Investigator position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies for the Field Assistant/Investigator post announced by HNBGU.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post-graduate degree (MA/MSc/MLIS/M.Ed. etc.) in any Social Science or Humanities discipline.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Field Assistant/Investigator position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive consolidated emoluments of ₹25,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is through Email. Candidates need to send their applications to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any fieldwork experience required?
faq.answer: Yes, demonstrated fieldwork experience is a requirement. This includes village surveys, ethnographic work, or socio-economic surveys.

faq.question: Q7. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The job is based in Srinagar (Garhwal), Uttarakhand, under Hemvati Nandan Bahuguna Garhwal University.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Field Assistant/Investigator role?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on a Walk-in interview.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any age limit relaxations mentioned?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any age limits or relaxations. It is advisable to check the detailed notification.

faq.question: Q10. What is the email address to send the application?
faq.answer: Applications should be sent to [email protected] with the subject line "Application for Field Assistant - Jaunsari Project".

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the Field Assistant/Investigator post at HNBGU?
